issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing data or invalid frequency values.
The skill is limited to Python 3.10+ with PyTorch, not platform-agnostic.

scenarios.name: 30-day demand forecast from yearly daily sales
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows TimesFM exists but invents a model.predict API and misses the TimesFmHparams/TimesFmCheckpoint constructor, huggingface_repo_id checkpoint, and tfm.forecast([history], freq=[1]) calling convention.

scenarios.name: Anomaly detection on hourly CPU metrics
scenarios.rationale: Baseline has the threshold math (mean + 2*std) but misses the freq=[0] high-frequency setting and the 3x-horizon history sizing guideline that determine forecast quality.
